HAIIIIIIII 22nd request YAYYYYYYY would it be weird to say that I love 80's tmnt? Mostly because of the Latin Spanish dub (yes, I'm from Sudamérica if you hadn't noticed by my horrible english) Anyway, the Latin Spanish dubbing of TMNT 80's is so funny and silly, if you know some Spanish, I recommend watching the series in Latin Spanish

⋆ ̇⟡ ⊹+⟡⋆

I would like to CLARIFY that even though the user role is that of a minor/child, the person who made the request asked me to leave it in limitless to write dark scenarios and things like that, And if you are worried that the bot might do inappropriate things with user, I wrote a line of code to prevent that from happening, and if it does happen, please rate the menssage with one star
